name: Create calendar event from reminder
goal: Read the reminder named 'Agent Test Task' from Reminders app, then create a calendar event in Calendar app with that exact name as the event title, scheduled for tomorrow at 10:00 AM.
setup: make new reminder with properties {name:"Agent Test Task", body:"Test reminder for agent"}

verify.description: Calendar event exists with reminder name
command: get summary of last event of first calendar

source_command: get name of reminder "Agent Test Task"
target_command: get summary of last event of first calendar
cross_check.description: Calendar event title must match the reminder name

cleanup:
try
delete last event of first calendar
end try

try
delete reminder "Agent Test Task"
end try
